tEn: AudioLM: a Language Modeling Approach to Audio Generation
tZh: AudioLM：一种基于语言建模的音频生成方法
sEn: AudioLM generates high-quality audio with long-term consistency by treating audio generation as a language modeling task.
sZh: AudioLM 通过将音频生成视为语言建模任务，实现了高质量且具有长期一致性的音频生成。
absEn: We introduce AudioLM, a framework for high-quality audio generation with long-term consistency. AudioLM maps the input audio to a sequence of discrete tokens and casts audio generation as a language modeling task in this representation space. We show how existing audio tokenizers provide different trade-offs between reconstruction quality and long-term structure, and we propose a hybrid tokenization scheme to achieve both objectives. Namely, we leverage the discretized activations of a masked language model pre-trained on audio to capture long-term structure and the discrete codes produced by a neural audio codec to achieve high-quality synthesis. By training on large corpora of raw audio waveforms, AudioLM learns to generate natural and coherent continuations given short prompts. When trained on speech, and without any transcript or annotation, AudioLM generates syntactically and semantically plausible speech continuations while also maintaining speaker identity and prosody for unseen speakers. Furthermore, we demonstrate how our approach extends beyond speech by generating coherent piano music continuations, despite being trained without any symbolic representation of music.
absZh: 我们提出了 AudioLM，一个用于高质量音频生成的框架，能够保持长期一致性。AudioLM 将输入音频映射为离散标记序列，并将音频生成视为该表示空间中的语言建模任务。我们展示了现有的音频分词器在重建质量和长期结构之间如何提供不同的权衡，并提出了一种混合分词方案以实现这两个目标。具体来说，我们利用预训练于音频的掩码语言模型的离散化激活来捕捉长期结构，并利用神经音频编解码器产生的离散码来实现高质量合成。通过在大量原始音频波形上训练，AudioLM 学会了在给定短提示的情况下生成自然且连贯的延续。当在语音上训练时，无需任何转录或标注，AudioLM 就能生成句法和语义上合理的语音延续，同时保持未见说话者的说话人身份和韵律。此外，我们展示了我们的方法如何扩展到语音之外，通过生成连贯的钢琴音乐延续，尽管训练时没有使用任何音乐的符号表示。

contrib.en: Proposes AudioLM, a framework combining semantic and acoustic tokens hierarchically for high-quality audio generation with long-term consistency.
contrib.zh: 提出AudioLM框架，通过分层结合语义和声学标记，实现高质量且长期一致的音频生成。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that semantic tokens from w2v-BERT capture linguistic content, while acoustic tokens from SoundStream ensure high-quality synthesis.
contrib.zh: 证明w2v-BERT的语义标记捕捉语言内容，SoundStream的声学标记确保高质量合成。

contrib.en: Shows AudioLM generates syntactically and semantically coherent speech continuations without text annotations, preserving speaker identity and prosody.
contrib.zh: 展示AudioLM无需文本标注即可生成句法和语义连贯的语音延续，并保留说话人身份和韵律。

contrib.en: Extends AudioLM to piano music continuation, generating coherent melodies and rhythms without symbolic music representations.
contrib.zh: 将AudioLM扩展到钢琴音乐延续，无需符号音乐表示即可生成连贯的旋律和节奏。

contrib.en: Provides a classifier that detects AudioLM-generated speech with 98.6% accuracy, mitigating misuse risks.
contrib.zh: 提供分类器以98.6%的准确率检测AudioLM生成的语音，降低滥用风险。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art lexical and syntactic knowledge in zero-shot metrics sWUGGY and sBLIMP without text supervision.
contrib.zh: 在零样本指标sWUGGY和sBLIMP上达到最先进的词汇和句法知识，无需文本监督。

limits.en: AudioLM is evaluated only on English speech and piano music; generalization to other audio types is not shown.
limits.zh: AudioLM仅在英语语音和钢琴音乐上评估，未展示对其他音频类型的泛化能力。

limits.en: The framework requires pre-trained tokenizers (w2v-BERT, SoundStream) and multiple Transformer stages, leading to high computational cost.
limits.zh: 该框架需要预训练的标记器（w2v-BERT、SoundStream）和多阶段Transformer，导致高计算成本。

limits.en: Generated speech may reflect societal biases in training data and may not preserve accent/dialect for underrepresented groups.
limits.zh: 生成的语音可能反映训练数据中的社会偏见，且可能无法保留代表性不足群体的口音/方言。

limits.en: The model's ability to continue speech with speaker identity preservation poses risks of spoofing biometric identification or impersonation.
limits.zh: 模型保留说话人身份延续语音的能力存在欺骗生物识别或冒充他人的风险。

limits.en: Human evaluation shows generated speech is nearly indistinguishable from real speech, raising ethical concerns despite high detection accuracy.
limits.zh: 人工评估显示生成的语音几乎无法与真实语音区分，尽管检测准确率高，但仍引发伦理问题。

items.en: We introduce AudioLM, a framework for high-quality audio generation with long-term consistency. AudioLM maps the input audio to a sequence of discrete tokens and casts audio generation as a language modeling task in this representation space. We show how existing audio tokenizers provide different trade-offs between reconstruction quality and long-term structure, and we propose a hybrid tokenization scheme to achieve both objectives. Namely, we leverage the discretized activations of a masked language model pre-trained on audio to capture long-term structure and the discrete codes produced by a neural audio codec to achieve high-quality synthesis. By training on large corpora of raw audio waveforms, AudioLM learns to generate natural and coherent continuations given short prompts. When trained on speech, and without any transcript or annotation, AudioLM generates syntactically and semantically plausible speech continuations while also maintaining speaker identity and prosody for unseen speakers. Furthermore, we demonstrate how our approach extends beyond speech by generating coherent piano music continuations, despite being trained without any symbolic representation of music.
items.zh: 我们提出了AudioLM，一个用于生成具有长期一致性的高质量音频的框架。AudioLM将输入音频映射为离散令牌序列，并将音频生成视为该表示空间中的语言建模任务。我们展示了现有的音频分词器如何在重建质量和长期结构之间提供不同的权衡，并提出了一种混合分词方案以实现这两个目标。具体而言，我们利用在音频上预训练的掩码语言模型的离散化激活来捕捉长期结构，并利用神经音频编解码器产生的离散码来实现高质量合成。通过在原始音频波形的大型语料库上进行训练，AudioLM学会了在给定短提示的情况下生成自然且连贯的延续。当在语音上训练时，无需任何转录或标注，AudioLM就能生成句法和语义上合理的语音延续，同时保持未见说话人的说话人身份和韵律。此外，我们展示了我们的方法如何扩展到语音之外，通过生成连贯的钢琴音乐延续，尽管训练时没有使用任何音乐的符号表示。

items.en: Audio signals, be they speech, music or environmental sounds, involve multiple scales of abstractions. For instance, speech can be analyzed at a very local acoustic or phonetic level but also in terms of prosody, syntax, grammar, or semantics. Music also follows a long-term structure, while being composed of highly non-stationary acoustic signals. When it comes to audio synthesis, these multiple scales interact in such a way that achieving high audio quality while displaying high-level consistency remains a challenge, in particular in the absence of strong supervision.
items.zh: 音频信号，无论是语音、音乐还是环境声音，都涉及多个抽象层次。例如，语音可以在非常局部的声学或音素层面进行分析，也可以在韵律、句法、语法或语义方面进行分析。音乐也遵循长期结构，同时由高度非平稳的声学信号组成。在音频合成方面，这些多个层次相互作用，使得在实现高音频质量的同时展示高层次一致性仍然是一个挑战，特别是在缺乏强监督的情况下。

items.en: Recent audio synthesis models have achieved nearly veridical signal quality by leveraging methods such as autoregressive waveform modeling [1, 2], adversarial training [3, 4, 5] or diffusion [6, 7]. Yet, when not provided with strong conditioning (e.g., linguistic features, a MIDI sequence), even powerful models like WaveNet [1] generate unstructured audio, such as babbling speech. Language models, on the other hand, have demonstrated their ability to model high-level, long-term structure for different content types, and the consequent advances in text [8, 9, 10] and image generation [11, 12] have paved the way towards synthesis of natural audio that remains intelligible and consistent over time. An important step in that direction, coined as “textless NLP”, has been recently achieved for unconditioned speech generation [13, 14]. In particular, Lakhotia et al. [14] show that a Transformer [15] trained on discretized speech units can generate coherent speech without relying on textual annotations. Yet, the acoustic diversity and the quality remain limited: the model is trained on clean speech only and synthesis is restricted to a single speaker.
items.zh: 最近的音频合成模型通过利用自回归波形建模[1, 2]、对抗训练[3, 4, 5]或扩散[6, 7]等方法，实现了近乎真实的信号质量。然而，当没有提供强条件（例如，语言特征、MIDI序列）时，即使是像WaveNet[1]这样强大的模型也会生成无结构的音频，例如咿呀学语的语音。另一方面，语言模型已经展示了它们对不同内容类型的高层次、长期结构进行建模的能力，并且随之而来的文本[8, 9, 10]和图像生成[11, 12]的进步为生成随时间保持可理解和一致的天然音频铺平了道路。朝着这个方向迈出的重要一步，被称为“无文本NLP”，最近已在无条件语音生成中实现[13, 14]。特别是，Lakhotia等人[14]表明，在离散化语音单元上训练的Transformer[15]可以生成连贯的语音，而无需依赖文本标注。然而，声学多样性和质量仍然有限：该模型仅在干净语音上训练，并且合成仅限于单个说话人。

items.en: In this work, we introduce AudioLM, a framework that enables high-quality audio generation with long-term coherent structure, as demonstrated by our experiments on both speech and piano music continuation. We achieve this objective by combining recent advances in adversarial neural audio compression [16], self-supervised representation learning [17] and language modeling [18]. Specifically, starting from raw audio waveforms, we first construct coarse semantic tokens from a model pre-trained with a self-supervised masked language modeling objective [19]. Autoregressive modeling of these tokens captures both local dependencies (e.g., phonetics in speech, local melody in piano music) and global long-term structure (e.g., language syntax and semantic content in speech; harmony and rhythm in piano music). However, these tokens lead to poor reconstruction. To overcome this limitation, in addition to semantic tokens, we rely on fine-level acoustic tokens produced by a SoundStream neural codec [16], which capture the details of the audio waveform and allow for high-quality synthesis. Training a language model to generate both semantic and acoustic tokens leads simultaneously to high audio quality and long-term consistency. In summary, we make the following contributions:
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了AudioLM，一个能够生成具有长期连贯结构的高质量音频的框架，正如我们在语音和钢琴音乐延续上的实验所证明的那样。我们通过结合对抗性神经音频压缩[16]、自监督表示学习[17]和语言建模[18]的最新进展来实现这一目标。具体来说，从原始音频波形开始，我们首先从使用自监督掩码语言建模目标预训练的模型中构建粗粒度语义令牌[19]。这些令牌的自回归建模捕捉了局部依赖关系（例如，语音中的音素，钢琴音乐中的局部旋律）和全局长期结构（例如，语音中的语言句法和语义内容；钢琴音乐中的和声和节奏）。然而，这些令牌导致重建效果差。为了克服这一限制，除了语义令牌之外，我们还依赖于SoundStream神经编解码器[16]产生的细粒度声学令牌，这些令牌捕捉了音频波形的细节并允许高质量合成。训练一个语言模型来生成语义和声学令牌同时实现了高音频质量和长期一致性。总之，我们做出了以下贡献：

items.en: We propose AudioLM, a framework for audio generation that combines semantic and acoustic tokens in a hierarchical fashion to achieve long-term consistency and high quality.
items.zh: 我们提出了AudioLM，一个音频生成框架，以分层方式结合语义和声学令牌，以实现长期一致性和高质量。

items.en: We compare the semantic tokens extracted from a pre-trained w2v-BERT [17] and the acoustic tokens from SoundStream [16] on a speech dataset, and we show that they complement each other in terms of phonetic discriminability and reconstruction quality.
items.zh: 我们比较了从预训练的w2v-BERT[17]中提取的语义令牌和从SoundStream[16]中提取的声学令牌在语音数据集上的表现，并展示了它们在音素区分性和重建质量方面相互补充。

items.en: We demonstrate the ability of AudioLM to generate coherent speech in terms of phonetics, syntax and semantics, without relying on textual annotations. Moreover, when conditioned on a prefix (or prompt) of only 3 times3absent3\text{\,}~{}seconds of speech from a speaker not seen during training, AudioLM produces consistent continuations while maintaining the original speaker voice, prosody and recording conditions (e.g., level of reverberation, background noise).
items.zh: 我们展示了AudioLM在无需文本标注的情况下，生成在音素、句法和语义方面连贯的语音的能力。此外，当以训练中未见过的说话人仅3秒的语音作为前缀（或提示）时，AudioLM产生一致的延续，同时保持原始说话人的声音、韵律和录音条件（例如，混响水平、背景噪声）。

items.en: We show that AudioLM is also suited for music generation. When training on piano recordings, it generates convincing continuations that are coherent with the prompt in terms of melody, harmony, tone and rhythm.
items.zh: 我们展示了AudioLM也适用于音乐生成。当在钢琴录音上训练时，它生成令人信服的延续，在旋律、和声、音调和节奏方面与提示连贯。

items.en: We acknowledge the potential risks associated with the use of generative models that enable speech continuation, and we mitigate these risks by training a classifier that can detect synthetic speech generated by AudioLM with very high accuracy.
items.zh: 我们承认与使用能够进行语音延续的生成模型相关的潜在风险，并通过训练一个能够以非常高的准确率检测AudioLM生成的合成语音的分类器来减轻这些风险。

items.en: We encourage the reader to listen to the samples produced by AudioLM in the accompanying material.111https://google-research.github.io/seanet/audiolm/examples
items.zh: 我们鼓励读者在附带材料中收听AudioLM生成的样本。111https://google-research.github.io/seanet/audiolm/examples

items.en: High-fidelity neural audio synthesis. Recent years have seen tremendous progress in the quality of audio generated by neural networks, largely attributed to the introduction of objective functions that improve over simple waveform regression. In particular, WaveNet [1] introduced an autoregressive classification approach to speech synthesis, with quality that significantly outperformed traditional concatenative and parametric approaches at the cost of slow inference. While WaveNet inspired more computationally efficient alternatives such as WaveRNN [2] or parallel WaveNet [20], a significant paradigm shift occurred with the introduction of adversarial audio generation [3, 21, 4], which enables high fidelity generation without any autoregressive component. Moreover, combining such high-quality synthesis systems with differentiable quantization [22, 23, 24], allows training end-to-end neural codecs [25, 26, 16, 27] by compressing activations in a bottleneck layer. AudioLM leverages the tokens produced by a SoundStream neural codec [16], not as intermediate representations for lossy reconstruction, but rather as targets for a sequence modeling task operating at a lower sampling rate, which can be decoded back to audio at the original sampling rate.
items.zh: 高保真神经音频合成。近年来，神经网络生成的音频质量取得了巨大进步，这主要归功于引入了优于简单波形回归的目标函数。特别是，WaveNet[1]引入了一种自回归分类方法用于语音合成，其质量显著优于传统的拼接和参数方法，但代价是推理速度慢。虽然WaveNet启发了更高效的计算替代方案，如WaveRNN[2]或并行WaveNet[20]，但随着对抗性音频生成的引入[3, 21, 4]，发生了一个重要的范式转变，它可以在没有任何自回归组件的情况下实现高保真生成。此外，将这种高质量合成系统与可微量化[22, 23, 24]相结合，可以通过在瓶颈层压缩激活来训练端到端神经编解码器[25, 26, 16, 27]。AudioLM利用了SoundStream神经编解码器[16]产生的令牌，不是作为有损重建的中间表示，而是作为在较低采样率下运行的序列建模任务的目标，该任务可以解码回原始采样率的音频。

items.en: Self-supervised learning of audio representations. While neural audio synthesis typically focuses on modeling fine details of the signal, most self-supervised learning approaches rather aim at discovering high-level representations that correlate with coarse, symbolic features (e.g., phonemes, musical notes, class labels). This is typically achieved by proposing proxy objectives that do not rely on any transcript or label, but rather exploit regularities in the structure of the audio signals. Among these approaches, contrastive training learns representations for which pairs of positive examples are closer to each other than negative pairs. Positive pairs can be, for example, two segments that are close temporally [28, 29, 30] or two augmented views of the same sequence [31].
items.zh: 音频表示的自监督学习。虽然神经音频合成通常专注于建模信号的精细细节，但大多数自监督学习方法更旨在发现与粗粒度、符号特征（例如，音素、音符、类别标签）相关的高层表示。这通常通过提出不依赖任何转录或标签的代理目标来实现，而是利用音频信号结构中的规律性。在这些方法中，对比学习学习到的表示使得正样本对彼此比负样本对更接近。正样本对可以是例如时间上接近的两个片段[28, 29, 30]或同一序列的两个增强视图[31]。

items.en: Another line of work, inspired by NLP systems pre-training [19, 18], has explored the discretization of audio signals into a finite vocabulary of tokens to serve as targets for masked language modeling pre-training [19], i.e. predicting long contiguous spans of masked tokens from a wide context. The discretization strategy is critical to the downstream performance of such models. Popular quantization strategies include quantizing representations optimized for future time step prediction [32], starting from quantizing low-level audio features followed by iterations of quantization target refinement [33], and jointly learning the quantization along with the masked language model [17]. The discriminative nature of these contrastive and predictive objectives, as well as the fact that they require exploiting long-term dependencies, allow learning representations that encode coarse, high-level information about the signal (e.g., phonemes and word identity when trained on speech [34]). These representations are thus particularly useful for discriminative downstream tasks such as speech recognition [33] or audio classification [30]. However, as they are not optimized to encode fine details of original audio signals, they are poorly invertible and thus not directly usable for synthesis. AudioLM avoids this limitation by leveraging these high-level representations as a conditioning signal that carries semantic information and guides the prediction of high-quality acoustic tokens.
items.zh: 另一项工作，受NLP系统预训练[19, 18]的启发，探索了将音频信号离散化为有限词汇的令牌，作为掩码语言建模预训练的目标[19]，即从广泛的上下文中预测掩码令牌的长连续跨度。离散化策略对于这些模型的下游性能至关重要。流行的量化策略包括：量化针对未来时间步预测优化的表示[32]，从量化低级音频特征开始，然后迭代量化目标细化[33]，以及联合学习量化与掩码语言模型[17]。这些对比和预测目标的判别性质，以及它们需要利用长期依赖关系的事实，使得学习到的表示编码了关于信号的粗粒度、高层信息（例如，在语音上训练时的音素和词身份[34]）。因此，这些表示对于判别性下游任务特别有用，如语音识别[33]或音频分类[30]。然而，由于它们没有针对编码原始音频信号的精细细节进行优化，因此它们很难逆，因此不能直接用于合成。AudioLM通过利用这些高层表示作为携带语义信息并指导高质量声学令牌预测的条件信号，避免了这一限制。

items.en: Generating natural signals with language models. Neural language models have demonstrated remarkable abilities for tasks as diverse as open-ended dialog modeling [35], code completion [36] or even solving integrals and differential equations [37]. The key underlying mechanism of the best of these models is self-attention [15], which is suitable for modeling rich and complex long-range dependencies but, in the standard form, has a computational cost that grows quadratically with the length of the input sequences. This cost is acceptable for sequences of up to 103superscript10310^{3} tokens [38], however, it prevents modeling natural signals in their raw form (for example, modeling a 512×512512512512\times 512 image at the pixel level). While several works have explored efficient alternatives to self-attention [39, 40, 41], another solution to this scaling problem is to work with mappings of the natural signals to a compact, discrete representation space. A common approach is to model the representations in this space with an autoregressive Transformer, whose predictions are then mapped back to the original signal space. This approach has been used to generate high-resolution images [42, 11, 12] and long videos [43].
items.zh: 使用语言模型生成自然信号。神经语言模型在从开放域对话建模[35]、代码补全[36]到甚至求解积分和微分方程[37]等多样化的任务中展示了卓越的能力。这些模型中最好的关键底层机制是自注意力[15]，它适合建模丰富而复杂的远程依赖关系，但在标准形式下，其计算成本随输入序列长度呈二次增长。对于长达10^3个令牌的序列，这个成本是可以接受的[38]，然而，它阻止了以原始形式建模自然信号（例如，在像素级别建模512×512图像）。虽然有几项工作探索了自注意力的高效替代方案[39, 40, 41]，但解决这个缩放问题的另一个解决方案是使用自然信号到紧凑、离散表示空间的映射。一种常见的方法是使用自回归Transformer对该空间中的表示进行建模，然后将其预测映射回原始信号空间。这种方法已被用于生成高分辨率图像[42, 11, 12]和长视频[43]。

items.en: For audio, Jukebox [44] adopts a hierarchical approach to generate tokens at various temporal resolutions which are then combined to reconstruct music. Another notable line of work is “textless NLP” [13, 14, 45, 46], which models language directly in the speech domain, without any transcription, by training autoregressive generative models of low-bitrate audio tokens [28, 33]. While Jukebox and GSLM [14] show high temporal coherence (e.g., spoken language generated by GSLM is meaningful), their audio quality remains limited: the music generated by Jukebox displays significant artifacts, while the speech sampled from GSLM is limited to a single speaker in a clean setting. This is unlike Perceiver AR [41], which trains an autoregressive model on the discrete codes of a high-bitrate SoundStream [16] codec. The model can then generate piano music of high signal-level quality; however the temporal structure of the generated sequences can be further improved. AudioLM tackles both challenges of long-term coherence and high-quality by combining semantic and acoustic tokens in a generative framework. This leads to improvements over GSLM by generating speech continuations that preserve the original speaker’s identity and intonation, as well as extending audio continuation beyond speech by generating piano sequences with high-level coherence.
items.zh: 对于音频，Jukebox[44]采用分层方法生成不同时间分辨率的令牌，然后组合这些令牌以重建音乐。另一个值得注意的工作是“无文本NLP”[13, 14, 45, 46]，它通过训练低比特率音频令牌的自回归生成模型[28, 33]，直接在语音领域对语言进行建模，无需任何转录。虽然Jukebox和GSLM[14]显示出高时间连贯性（例如，GSLM生成的口语语言是有意义的），但它们的音频质量仍然有限：Jukebox生成的音乐显示出明显的伪影，而GSLM采样的语音仅限于干净环境中的单个说话人。这与Perceiver AR[41]不同，后者在高比特率SoundStream[16]编解码器的离散码上训练自回归模型。然后该模型可以生成高信号级质量的钢琴音乐；然而，生成序列的时间结构可以进一步改进。AudioLM通过在生成框架中结合语义和声学令牌，解决了长期连贯性和高质量这两个挑战。这导致了对GSLM的改进，通过生成保留原始说话人身份和语调的语音延续，以及通过生成具有高层连贯性的钢琴序列将音频延续扩展到语音之外。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of the tokenizers used in AudioLM. The acoustic tokens are produced by SoundStream [16] and enable high-quality audio synthesis. The semantic tokens are derived from representations produced by an intermediate layer of w2v-BERT [17] and enable long-term structural coherence.
items.capZh: 图1：AudioLM中使用的分词器概述。声学令牌由SoundStream[16]产生，支持高质量音频合成。语义令牌源自w2v-BERT[17]中间层产生的表示，支持长期结构连贯性。

items.en: In this section, we first describe the components of our framework, together with the representation and modeling challenges in audio generation. We address these challenges by proposing a hybrid tokenization scheme together with a multi-stage Transformer-based language model operating on the proposed tokens.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先描述我们框架的组成部分，以及音频生成中的表示和建模挑战。我们通过提出一种混合分词方案以及一个基于Transformer的多阶段语言模型来处理这些挑战，该模型对提出的令牌进行操作。

items.en: We consider a single channel audio sequence x∈ℝT𝑥superscriptℝ𝑇x\in\mathbb{R}^{T}, which is processed by the following three components of the AudioLM framework:
items.zh: 我们考虑一个单通道音频序列x∈ℝ^T，它由AudioLM框架的以下三个组件处理：

items.en: A tokenizer model, which maps x𝑥x into a sequence h=enc​(x)ℎenc𝑥h=\text{enc}(x), h=(h1,…,hT′)ℎsubscriptℎ1…subscriptℎsuperscript𝑇′h=(h_{1},\dots,h_{T^{\prime}}) of discrete tokens from a finite vocabulary, with T′≪Tmuch-less-thansuperscript𝑇′𝑇T^{\prime}\ll T.
items.zh: 一个分词器模型，它将x映射为离散令牌序列h=enc(x)，h=(h_1,…,h_{T'})，来自有限词汇表，且T'≪T。

items.en: A decoder-only Transformer language model that operates on the discrete tokens y𝑦y, trained to maximize the likelihood ∏t=1T′p​(ht|h<t)superscriptsubscriptproduct𝑡1superscript𝑇′𝑝conditionalsubscriptℎ𝑡subscriptℎabsent𝑡\prod_{t=1}^{T^{\prime}}p(h_{t}|h_{<t}). At inference time, the model predicts the token sequence h^^ℎ\hat{h} autoregressively.
items.zh: 一个仅解码器的Transformer语言模型，对离散令牌y进行操作，训练以最大化似然∏_{t=1}^{T'} p(h_t|h_{<t})。在推理时，该模型自回归地预测令牌序列ĥ。

items.en: A detokenizer model, which maps the sequence of predicted tokens back to audio, producing the waveform x^=dec​(h^)^𝑥dec^ℎ\hat{x}=\text{dec}(\hat{h}).
items.zh: 一个去分词器模型，将预测的 token 序列映射回音频，生成波形 x^=dec(h^)。

items.en: It is important to emphasize the following aspects: i) the number of tokens T′superscript𝑇′T^{\prime} is typically 2-3 orders of magnitude smaller than T𝑇T. This is critical to significantly increase the temporal context size of the language model, since the computational complexity of standard self-attention grows quadratically with respect to the sequence length; ii) the tokenizer and detokenizer are pre-trained and frozen ahead of training the language model, which decouples the tokenizers and the language model and simplifies the training setup.
items.zh: 需要强调以下几点：i) token 数量 T' 通常比 T 小 2-3 个数量级。这对显著增加语言模型的时间上下文大小至关重要，因为标准自注意力机制的计算复杂度随序列长度呈二次增长；ii) 分词器和去分词器在训练语言模型之前预训练并冻结，这解耦了分词器和语言模型，简化了训练设置。

full.sec: III-B Trade-offs of discrete audio representations
full.secZh: 三-B 离散音频表示的权衡

items.en: The tokenizer and detokenizer models allow us to operate on discrete audio representations. On the one hand, we want to be able to reconstruct audio waveforms at high quality, which introduces a lower bound on the bitrate and hence on the length of the token sequence. On the other hand, we aim at obtaining a compact representation that captures long-term dependencies. To reconcile these conflicting requirements, we rely on a combination of acoustic and semantic tokens, which are illustrated in Figure 1. In this tokenization scheme, the semantic tokens enable long-term structural coherence, while modeling the acoustic tokens conditioned on the semantic tokens enables high-quality audio synthesis.
items.zh: 分词器和去分词器模型使我们能够操作离散音频表示。一方面，我们希望以高质量重建音频波形，这引入了比特率的下限，从而限制了 token 序列的长度。另一方面，我们旨在获得能够捕捉长期依赖的紧凑表示。为了调和这些冲突的需求，我们依赖于声学 token 和语义 token 的组合，如图 1 所示。在这种分词方案中，语义 token 实现长期结构连贯性，而基于语义 token 条件建模的声学 token 则实现高质量音频合成。

items.en: We compute acoustic tokens using SoundStream [16], a state-of-the-art neural audio codec, which significantly outperforms non-neural codecs like Opus and EVS at low bitrates. SoundStream adopts a convolutional encoder to map the input waveform to a sequence of embeddings, whose sampling rate is significantly lower than the sampling rate of the original audio. We configure SoundStream to produce embeddings at 50 Hz (one every 20 ms) for input waveforms at 16 kHz. This is a 16000 / 50 = 320-fold reduction in the sampling rate. Each embedding is discretized using a residual vector quantizer (RVQ), which consists of a hierarchy of Q𝑄Q vector quantizers, each using a vocabulary of N𝑁N symbols. For example, using N=1024𝑁1024N=1024, Q=4𝑄4Q=4 results in a bitrate of 2000 bps (50⋅4⋅log2⁡1024⋅504subscript2102450\cdot 4\cdot\log_{2}1024). Hence, the input audio samples x𝑥x are represented by a matrix Y∈{1,…,N}TA×Q𝑌superscript1…𝑁subscript𝑇𝐴𝑄Y\in\{1,\dots,N\}^{{T_{A}}\times Q} of codebook symbols, with TA=T/320subscript𝑇𝐴𝑇320{T_{A}}=T/320. Then, the convolutional decoder of SoundStream maps this discrete representation to real-valued embeddings and then reconstructs the waveform. The codec achieves high quality by being trained end-to-end with a combination of reconstruction and adversarial losses.
items.zh: 我们使用 SoundStream [16] 计算声学 token，这是一种最先进的神经音频编解码器，在低比特率下显著优于 Opus 和 EVS 等非神经编解码器。SoundStream 采用卷积编码器将输入波形映射到嵌入序列，其采样率远低于原始音频的采样率。我们将 SoundStream 配置为在 16 kHz 输入波形下以 50 Hz（每 20 毫秒一个）生成嵌入。这是采样率的 16000/50 = 320 倍降低。每个嵌入使用残差向量量化器（RVQ）进行离散化，该量化器由 Q 个向量量化器的层级结构组成，每个量化器使用 N 个符号的词汇表。例如，使用 N=1024，Q=4 时，比特率为 2000 bps（50·4·log₂1024）。因此，输入音频样本 x 由码本符号矩阵 Y∈{1,…,N}^{TA×Q} 表示，其中 TA=T/320。然后，SoundStream 的卷积解码器将此离散表示映射到实值嵌入，并重建波形。该编解码器通过端到端训练，结合重建损失和对抗损失，实现了高质量。

items.en: We compute semantic tokens using w2v-BERT [17], a recently proposed model for learning self-supervised audio representations. When trained on large speech corpora, w2v-BERT learns to map the input audio waveform to a rich set of linguistic features. This is achieved by training a 0.6B-parameter Conformer-based model [47] using a combination of two self-supervised objectives: a masked language modeling (MLM) loss and a contrastive loss. While this model can be fine-tuned for discriminative tasks such as speech recognition or speech-to-text translation [48], AudioLM rather leverages the representations of the pre-trained w2v-BERT to model long-term temporal structure in a generative framework. To this end, we select an intermediate layer of the MLM module of w2v-BERT and compute embeddings at this level. We train a k𝑘k-means with K𝐾K clusters on these embeddings and use the centroid indices as semantic tokens. We found that normalizing w2v-BERT embeddings such that each dimension has zero mean and unit variance before clustering significantly improves their phonetic discriminability. w2v-BERT performs downsampling along the temporal dimension, so that real-valued 1024-dimensional feature vectors are computed at a sampling rate of 25 Hz (one every 40 ms). Hence, the input audio samples x𝑥x are transformed into a sequence of semantic tokens z=(z1,…,zTS)∈{1,…,K}TS𝑧subscript𝑧1…subscript𝑧subscript𝑇𝑆superscript1…𝐾subscript𝑇𝑆z=(z_{1},\dots,z_{T_{S}})\in\{1,\dots,K\}^{T_{S}} with TS=T/640subscript𝑇𝑆𝑇640{T_{S}}=T/640. For example, when T=16000𝑇16000T=16000, K=1024𝐾1024K=1024, this results in a bitrate equal to 250 bps. We note that our proposal for the extraction of semantic tokens from w2v-BERT resembles the token extraction from HuBERT in prior works [14, 45].
items.zh: 我们使用 w2v-BERT [17] 计算语义 token，这是一种最近提出的用于学习自监督音频表示的模型。在大规模语音语料库上训练时，w2v-BERT 学习将输入音频波形映射到丰富的语言特征集。这是通过使用两种自监督目标的组合训练一个 0.6B 参数的基于 Conformer 的模型 [47] 实现的：掩码语言建模（MLM）损失和对比损失。虽然该模型可以针对语音识别或语音到文本翻译 [48] 等判别任务进行微调，但 AudioLM 利用预训练 w2v-BERT 的表示在生成框架中建模长期时间结构。为此，我们选择 w2v-BERT 的 MLM 模块的中间层，并在此级别计算嵌入。我们训练一个具有 K 个聚类的 k-means 算法，并使用质心索引作为语义 token。我们发现，在聚类之前对 w2v-BERT 嵌入进行归一化，使每个维度具有零均值和单位方差，显著提高了其语音可区分性。w2v-BERT 沿时间维度进行下采样，因此以 25 Hz（每 40 毫秒一个）的采样率计算实值 1024 维特征向量。因此，输入音频样本 x 被转换为语义 token 序列 z=(z₁,…,z_{TS})∈{1,…,K}^{TS}，其中 TS=T/640。例如，当 T=16000，K=1024 时，这导致比特率为 250 bps。我们注意到，我们从 w2v-BERT 提取语义 token 的方案类似于先前工作中从 HuBERT 提取 token 的方法 [14, 45]。

items.en: To motivate our hybrid tokenization scheme, we contrast the different properties of the acoustic tokens obtained from SoundStream, and the semantic tokens obtained from w2v-BERT, by comparing them in terms of audio quality reconstruction and phonetic discriminability. We evaluate the reconstruction quality by training a SoundStream decoder to reconstruct audio from tokens. We then compute the ViSQOL score [49, 50], a computational proxy for perceived similarity between a reference audio and its reconstruction. In particular, we use the “speech” mode, which operates on 16 kHz signals.
items.zh: 为了激励我们的混合分词方案，我们通过比较从 SoundStream 获得的声学 token 和从 w2v-BERT 获得的语义 token 在音频质量重建和语音可区分性方面的不同特性。我们通过训练 SoundStream 解码器从 token 重建音频来评估重建质量。然后计算 ViSQOL 分数 [49, 50]，这是参考音频与其重建之间感知相似度的计算代理。具体来说，我们使用“语音”模式，该模式在 16 kHz 信号上运行。

items.en: We measure phonetic discriminability in terms of ABX error rate [51]. It is a distance-based metric that considers a set of phoneme trigrams which only differ in the central phoneme (e.g., “bit” vs. “bet”). ABX error rate measures how often a random instance X of a trigram (“bit”) is closer to an instance B of another trigram (“bet”) rather than to a different instance A of the same trigram (“bit”). We consider cases where all three sounds A, B, and X are uttered by the same speaker (within-speaker) and where A and B are uttered by the same speaker and X is coming from a different speaker (across-speaker) [52]. To allow uniform comparison across the two representations, we represent speech using residual vector-quantized embeddings, where each frame is represented by its corresponding centroid for w2v-BERT or by the output of a SoundStream quantizer. We calculate ABX using scripts published with the Libri-Light dataset [53] with the default settings and report scores obtained on LibriSpeech dev-clean [54]. Table I shows that acoustic tokens provide a good reconstruction quality (ViSQOL of 3.3 for 2000 bps, 3.9 for 6000 bps), but poor phonetic discriminability. Conversely, semantic tokens extracted from the 7th layer from the MLM module of w2v-BERT significantly improve phonetic discriminability, but they do not attain high reconstruction quality, even when matching the bitrate of the acoustic tokens.
items.zh: 我们以 ABX 错误率 [51] 衡量语音可区分性。这是一种基于距离的度量，考虑一组仅在中心音素上不同的音素三元组（例如，“bit” vs. “bet”）。ABX 错误率衡量一个三元组（“bit”）的随机实例 X 比同一三元组（“bit”）的不同实例 A 更接近另一个三元组（“bet”）的实例 B 的频率。我们考虑所有三个声音 A、B 和 X 由同一说话者发出（说话者内）以及 A 和 B 由同一说话者发出而 X 来自不同说话者（说话者间）的情况 [52]。为了允许两种表示之间的统一比较，我们使用残差向量量化嵌入表示语音，其中每个帧由其对应的 w2v-BERT 质心或 SoundStream 量化器的输出表示。我们使用 Libri-Light 数据集 [53] 发布的脚本，在默认设置下计算 ABX，并报告在 LibriSpeech dev-clean [54] 上获得的分数。表 I 显示，声学 token 提供了良好的重建质量（2000 bps 时 ViSQOL 为 3.3，6000 bps 时为 3.9），但语音可区分性较差。相反，从 w2v-BERT 的 MLM 模块第 7 层提取的语义 token 显著提高了语音可区分性，但即使匹配声学 token 的比特率，也无法达到高重建质量。

items.en: Consequently, achieving both high quality and long-term consistency with only one of the tokenizers is challenging. To illustrate this point further, we can model the sequences of one of the token types and inspect the properties of the resulting model. We perform this on the acoustic tokens, since the semantic tokens only allow for poor audio synthesis. We train a decoder-only Transformer on the sequence of acoustic tokens, by flattening Y𝑌Y in a row-major order to a sequence of tokens y+o𝑦𝑜y+o of length TA⋅Q⋅subscript𝑇𝐴𝑄{T_{A}}\cdot Q, where y=(y11,y12,…,y1Q,y21,…,yTAQ)𝑦superscriptsubscript𝑦11superscriptsubscript𝑦12…superscriptsubscript𝑦1𝑄superscriptsubscript𝑦21…superscriptsubscript𝑦subscript𝑇𝐴𝑄y=(y_{1}^{1},y_{1}^{2},\ldots,y_{1}^{Q},y_{2}^{1},\ldots,y_{{T_{A}}}^{Q}), ytqsuperscriptsubscript𝑦𝑡𝑞y_{t}^{q} is the token produced by the q𝑞q-th quantizer for the t𝑡t-th time step, and o=(o1,o2,…,oTA⋅Q)𝑜subscript𝑜1subscript𝑜2…subscript𝑜⋅subscript𝑇𝐴𝑄o=(o_{1},o_{2},\dots,o_{{T_{A}}\cdot Q}) is the vector of offsets for creating unique token indices for the Q𝑄Q layers of the residual vector quantizer, with oi=(i−1​mod​Q)⋅Nsubscript𝑜𝑖⋅𝑖1mod𝑄𝑁o_{i}=(i-1\;\textup{mod}\;Q)\cdot N. In the following, we omit the offsets from the notation and assume proper offsetting implicitly. Using the model trained only on the acoustic tokens, we sample speech continuations from a prompt of 4 times4absent4\text{\,}~{}seconds. While both the recording conditions and the speaker identity from the prompt are preserved, the linguistic content is inconsistent, and often akin to babbling (see “Generation without semantic tokens” in the accompanying material1).
items.zh: 因此，仅使用一种分词器同时实现高质量和长期一致性是具有挑战性的。为了进一步说明这一点，我们可以对一种 token 类型的序列进行建模，并检查所得模型的属性。我们在声学 token 上执行此操作，因为语义 token 仅允许较差的音频合成。我们在声学 token 序列上训练一个仅解码器 Transformer，通过按行主序将 Y 展平为长度为 TA·Q 的 token 序列 y+o，其中 y=(y₁¹, y₁², …, y₁^Q, y₂¹, …, y_{TA}^Q)，y_t^q 是第 q 个量化器在第 t 个时间步产生的 token，o=(o₁, o₂, …, o_{TA·Q}) 是为残差向量量化器的 Q 层创建唯一 token 索引的偏移向量，其中 o_i=(i-1 mod Q)·N。在下文中，我们从符号中省略偏移量，并隐含地假设适当的偏移。使用仅在声学 token 上训练的模型，我们从 4 秒的提示中采样语音延续。虽然提示中的录音条件和说话者身份得以保留，但语言内容不一致，通常类似于咿呀学语（参见附带材料¹中的“无语义 token 的生成”）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The three stages of the hierarchical modeling of semantic and acoustic tokens in AudioLM: i) semantic modeling for long-term structural coherence, ii) coarse acoustic modeling conditioned on the semantic tokens and iii) fine acoustic modeling. With the default configuration, for every semantic token there are 2​Q′2superscript𝑄′2Q^{\prime} acoustic tokens in the second stage and 2​(Q−Q′)2𝑄superscript𝑄′2(Q-Q^{\prime}) tokens in the third stage. The factor of 2 comes from the fact that the sampling rate of SoundStream embeddings is twice as that of the w2v-BERT embeddings.
items.capZh: 图 2：AudioLM 中语义和声学 token 分层建模的三个阶段：i) 用于长期结构连贯性的语义建模，ii) 基于语义 token 条件的粗声学建模，以及 iii) 细声学建模。在默认配置下，对于每个语义 token，第二阶段有 2Q' 个声学 token，第三阶段有 2(Q-Q') 个 token。因子 2 来自 SoundStream 嵌入的采样率是 w2v-BERT 嵌入的两倍。

full.sec: III-C Hierarchical modeling of semantic and acoustic tokens
full.secZh: 三-C 语义和声学标记的分层建模

items.en: The observations in the previous section suggest that, by modeling both semantic and acoustic tokens within the same framework, the semantic tokens would ensure long-term consistency (by capturing linguistic content for speech, melody and rhythm for music), while the acoustic tokens would ensure high-quality audio synthesis (by capturing the acoustic details). We build the AudioLM framework on this hypothesis. Concretely, we adopt a hierarchical approach, by first modeling the semantic tokens for the entire sequence, and then use these as conditioning to predict the acoustic tokens. This approach has two main advantages: i) the hierarchical modeling reflects the conditional independence assumption that semantic tokens are expected to be conditionally independent from past acoustic tokens given past semantic tokens, that is, p​(zt|z<t,y<t)≈p​(zt|z<t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑡subscript𝑧absent𝑡subscript𝑦absent𝑡𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑡subscript𝑧absent𝑡p(z_{t}|z_{<t},y_{<t})\approx p(z_{t}|z_{<t}); ii) the token sequence per stage is reduced compared to alternatives such as modeling the interleaved sequence of semantic and acoustic tokens, allowing for computationally more efficient training and inference.
items.zh: 上一节的观察表明，通过在同一个框架中对语义和声学 token 进行建模，语义 token 将确保长期一致性（通过捕获语音的语言内容、音乐的旋律和节奏），而声学 token 将确保高质量音频合成（通过捕获声学细节）。我们基于这一假设构建 AudioLM 框架。具体来说，我们采用分层方法，首先对整个序列的语义 token 进行建模，然后将其用作条件来预测声学 token。这种方法有两个主要优点：i) 分层建模反映了条件独立性假设，即语义 token 在给定过去语义 token 的条件下，预期与过去的声学 token 条件独立，即 p(z_t|z_{<t}, y_{<t}) ≈ p(z_t|z_{<t})；ii) 与建模语义和声学 token 交错序列等替代方案相比，每个阶段的 token 序列减少，从而允许计算更高效的训练和推理。

items.en: AudioLM performs three subsequent stages, as illustrated in Figure 2. In all stages, we use a separate decoder-only Transformer trained for predicting next tokens given all previous ground-truth tokens in the corresponding stage.
items.zh: AudioLM 执行三个后续阶段，如图 2 所示。在所有阶段中，我们使用一个单独的仅解码器 Transformer，该 Transformer 在给定对应阶段所有先前真实 token 的条件下，训练用于预测下一个 token。

items.en: Semantic modeling. The first stage models p​(zt|z<t)𝑝conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑡subscript𝑧absent𝑡p(z_{t}|z_{<t}), the autoregressive prediction of semantic tokens to capture long-term temporal structure.
items.zh: 语义建模。第一阶段建模 p(z_t|z_{<t})，即语义 token 的自回归预测，以捕捉长期时间结构。

items.en: Coarse acoustic modeling. The second stage proceeds analogously on the acoustic tokens, but it only predicts the acoustic tokens from the coarse Q′superscript𝑄′Q^{\prime} SoundStream quantizers, conditioned on the semantic tokens. Due to residual quantization in SoundStream, the acoustic tokens have a hierarchical structure: tokens from the coarse quantizers recover acoustic properties like speaker identity and recording conditions, while leaving only the fine acoustic details to the fine quantizer tokens, which are modeled by the next stage. We rely on the simple approach of flattening the acoustic tokens in a row-major order to handle their hierarchical structure. Consequently, the second stage models p​(ytq|z,y<t≤Q′,yt<q)𝑝conditionalsuperscriptsubscript𝑦𝑡𝑞𝑧superscriptsubscript𝑦absent𝑡absentsuperscript𝑄′superscriptsubscript𝑦𝑡absent𝑞p(y_{t}^{q}|z,y_{<t}^{\leq Q^{\prime}},y_{t}^{<q}), for q≤Q′𝑞superscript𝑄′q\leq Q^{\prime}, where the corresponding token sequence is (z1,z2,…,zTS,y11,y12,…,y1Q′,y21,y22,…,,y2Q′,…,yTAQ′)(z_{1},z_{2},\dots,z_{T_{S}},y_{1}^{1},y_{1}^{2},\dots,y_{1}^{Q^{\prime}},y_{2}^{1},y_{2}^{2},\dots,,y_{2}^{Q^{\prime}},\dots,y_{T_{A}}^{Q^{\prime}}), with y11superscriptsubscript𝑦11y_{1}^{1} being the first token predicted during training.
items.zh: 粗声学建模。第二阶段类似地处理声学 token，但仅预测来自粗 Q' 个 SoundStream 量化器的声学 token，并以语义 token 为条件。由于 SoundStream 中的残差量化，声学 token 具有分层结构：来自粗量化器的 token 恢复声学属性，如说话者身份和录音条件，而仅将精细的声学细节留给细量化器 token，这些由下一阶段建模。我们采用简单的方法，按行主序展平声学 token 以处理其分层结构。因此，第二阶段建模 p(y_t^q | z, y_{<t}^{≤Q'}, y_t^{<q})，其中 q ≤ Q'，对应的 token 序列为 (z₁, z₂, …, z_{TS}, y₁¹, y₁², …, y₁^{Q'}, y₂¹, y₂², …, y₂^{Q'}, …, y_{TA}^{Q'})，其中 y₁¹ 是训练期间预测的第一个 token。

items.en: Fine acoustic modeling. The third stage operates on acoustic tokens corresponding to the fine quantizers, using the Q′superscript𝑄′Q^{\prime} coarse tokens as conditioning and modeling the conditional probability distribution p​(ytq|y≤Q′,y<t>Q′,yt<q)𝑝conditionalsuperscriptsubscript𝑦𝑡𝑞superscript𝑦absentsuperscript𝑄′superscriptsubscript𝑦absent𝑡absentsuperscript𝑄′superscriptsubscript𝑦𝑡absent𝑞p(y_{t}^{q}|y^{\leq Q^{\prime}},y_{<t}^{>Q^{\prime}},y_{t}^{<q}) for q>Q′𝑞superscript𝑄′q>Q^{\prime}. That is, ytqsuperscriptsubscript𝑦𝑡𝑞y_{t}^{q} is predicted based on all tokens corresponding to the coarse Q′superscript𝑄′Q^{\prime} quantizers, followed by the fine Q−Q′𝑄superscript𝑄′Q-Q^{\prime} quantizers at previous time steps, together with the already decoded tokens at the current time step corresponding to the coarser quantizers. In this stage, we further improve audio quality, removing the lossy compression artifacts that remain after the second stage.
items.zh: 细声学建模。第三阶段处理对应于细量化器的声学 token，使用 Q' 个粗 token 作为条件，并建模条件概率分布 p(y_t^q | y^{≤Q'}, y_{<t}^{>Q'}, y_t^{<q})，其中 q > Q'。也就是说，y_t^q 基于所有对应于粗 Q' 个量化器的 token，随后是先前时间步的细 Q-Q' 个量化器，以及当前时间步已解码的对应于较粗量化器的 token。在此阶段，我们进一步提高音频质量，去除第二阶段后残留的有损压缩伪影。

items.en: Although the second and third stage could be merged into a single stage, we adopt the solution with two separate stages to limit the sequence length that the model has to process at once. First, considering that fine acoustic tokens are conditionally independent from semantic tokens when conditioned on coarse acoustic tokens, the third stage can ignore the semantic tokens, which reduces the total sequence length. Moreover, under the assumption that the fine acoustic details are determined locally by the coarse acoustic tokens, we perform the third stage on batches of non-overlapping audio chunks of 3 seconds, allowing us to scale this stage independently of the target audio sequence length as well as to use more residual quantization layers Q𝑄Q to achieve higher quality.
items.zh: 尽管第二阶段和第三阶段可以合并为一个阶段，但我们采用两个独立阶段的解决方案，以限制模型一次必须处理的序列长度。首先，考虑到细声学 token 在给定粗声学 token 的条件下与语义 token 条件独立，第三阶段可以忽略语义 token，从而减少总序列长度。此外，在假设细声学细节由粗声学 token 局部确定的条件下，我们在 3 秒的非重叠音频块批次上执行第三阶段，使我们能够独立于目标音频序列长度来扩展此阶段，并使用更多残差量化层 Q 来实现更高质量。

items.en: After training, we can generate audio with AudioLM as detailed below. Depending on the conditioning signal used, we obtain different forms of generation.
items.zh: 训练后，我们可以按如下详细方式使用 AudioLM 生成音频。根据所使用的条件信号，我们获得不同形式的生成。

items.en: Unconditional generation. In this setting, we sample unconditionally all semantic tokens z^^𝑧\hat{z}, which we then use as conditioning for acoustic modeling. The samples in the accompanying material1 show that the model generates diverse, syntactically and semantically consistent linguistic content, with varying speaker identity, prosody, acoustic conditions. Section IV-E furthermore validates quantitatively the lexical and syntactic knowledge of the model.
items.zh: 无条件生成。在此设置中，我们无条件地采样所有语义 token ẑ，然后将其用作声学建模的条件。附带材料¹中的样本显示，模型生成多样、句法和语义一致的语言内容，具有变化的说话者身份、韵律和声学条件。第 IV-E 节进一步定量验证了模型的词汇和句法知识。

items.en: Acoustic generation. In this setting, we use the ground-truth semantic tokens z𝑧z extracted from a test sequence x𝑥x as conditioning to generate the acoustic tokens. Sections IV-C and IV-D show that, in this case, the generated audio sequences still vary in speaker identity but the content of the spoken sentence remains the same, matching the ground-truth transcript of x𝑥x. This shows that the semantic tokens capture the semantic content.
items.zh: 声学生成。在此设置中，我们使用从测试序列 x 中提取的真实语义 token z 作为条件来生成声学 token。第 IV-C 和 IV-D 节显示，在这种情况下，生成的音频序列在说话者身份上仍然变化，但所说句子的内容保持不变，与 x 的真实转录匹配。这表明语义 token 捕捉了语义内容。

items.en: Generating continuations. Our main application of interest is generating continuations from a short prompt x𝑥x. To do so, we first map the prompt to the corresponding semantic tokens z≤tssubscript𝑧absentsubscript𝑡𝑠z_{\leq t_{s}} and to the coarse acoustic tokens y≤ta≤Q′superscriptsubscript𝑦absentsubscript𝑡𝑎absentsuperscript𝑄′y_{\leq t_{a}}^{\leq Q^{\prime}}. The first stage generates z^>tssubscript^𝑧absentsubscript𝑡𝑠\hat{z}_{>t_{s}}, the continuation of semantic tokens autoregressively based on the conditioning z≤tssubscript𝑧absentsubscript𝑡𝑠z_{\leq t_{s}}. In the second stage, we concatenate the entire semantic token sequence (z≤ts,z^>ts)subscript𝑧absentsubscript𝑡𝑠subscript^𝑧absentsubscript𝑡𝑠(z_{\leq t_{s}},\hat{z}_{>t_{s}}) along with the coarse acoustic tokens of the prompt y≤ta≤Q′superscriptsubscript𝑦absentsubscript𝑡𝑎absentsuperscript𝑄′y_{\leq t_{a}}^{\leq Q^{\prime}} and feed it as conditioning to the coarse acoustic model, which then samples the continuations of the corresponding acoustic tokens. In the third stage, we process the coarse acoustic tokens with the fine acoustic model. Finally, we feed both the prompt and the sampled acoustic tokens to the SoundStream decoder to reconstruct a waveform x^^𝑥\hat{x}. Section IV-F shows that, when prompted with only 3 seconds of speech from an unseen speaker, AudioLM generates continuations that are hardly distinguishable from the original voice. Moreover, Section IV-I demonstrates the performance of AudioLM beyond speech, by continuing piano performances.
items.zh: 生成延续。我们感兴趣的主要应用是从短提示 x 生成延续。为此，我们首先将提示映射到对应的语义 token z_{≤t_s} 和粗声学 token y_{≤t_a}^{≤Q'}。第一阶段基于条件 z_{≤t_s} 自回归生成语义 token 的延续 ẑ_{>t_s}。在第二阶段，我们将整个语义 token 序列 (z_{≤t_s}, ẑ_{>t_s}) 与提示的粗声学 token y_{≤t_a}^{≤Q'} 连接起来，并将其作为条件输入粗声学模型，然后该模型采样对应声学 token 的延续。在第三阶段，我们使用细声学模型处理粗声学 token。最后，我们将提示和采样的声学 token 输入 SoundStream 解码器，以重建波形 x̂。第 IV-F 节显示，当仅使用 3 秒来自未见说话者的语音作为提示时，AudioLM 生成的延续与原始声音几乎无法区分。此外，第 IV-I 节通过延续钢琴演奏展示了 AudioLM 在语音之外的性能。

items.en: In order to showcase the general applicability of the AudioLM framework, we consider two tasks from different audio domains:
items.zh: 为了展示 AudioLM 框架的普遍适用性，我们考虑了来自不同音频领域的两个任务：

items.en: Speech continuation, where the model is expected to keep the speaker identity, prosody and recording conditions of the prompt and produce new content, which is syntactically correct and semantically consistent.
items.zh: 语音续接，模型需保持提示的说话人身份、韵律和录音条件，并生成句法正确且语义一致的新内容。

items.en: Piano continuation, where the model is expected to generate piano music, which is coherent with the prompt in terms of melody, harmony and rhythm.
items.zh: 钢琴续接，模型需生成与提示在旋律、和声和节奏上连贯的钢琴音乐。

items.en: As the speech and piano prompts we use for evaluation are respectively from unseen speakers and unseen performances, generating consistent continuations requires AudioLM to generalize beyond training data. We furthermore conduct experiments that provide empirical support for our hierarchical approach and shed light on the properties of the semantic and acoustic tokens. In order to mitigate the potential misuse of our framework, we provide an effective method for detecting speech generated by AudioLM.
items.zh: 由于我们用于评估的语音和钢琴提示分别来自未见过的说话人和未见过的演奏，生成一致的续接要求AudioLM泛化到训练数据之外。此外，我们进行了实验，为我们的层次化方法提供了实证支持，并揭示了语义和声学标记的属性。为了减轻我们框架的潜在滥用，我们提供了一种有效的方法来检测AudioLM生成的语音。

items.en: For speech, all components of AudioLM (SoundStream, w2v-BERT, the k𝑘k-means quantizer for w2v-BERT embeddings, the decoder-only Transformers) are trained on the unlab-60k train split of Libri-Light [53], consisting of 60k hours of English speech. While previous works [14, 45] use the 6k-hour clean subset [55] of Libri-Light for training the language model, AudioLM shows strong performance when trained on the more diverse and noisy unlab-60k subset. The increased robustness to the quality of the training data reduces the data preparation effort needed to apply our framework.
items.zh: 对于语音，AudioLM的所有组件（SoundStream、w2v-BERT、用于w2v-BERT嵌入的k均值量化器、仅解码器Transformer）均在Libri-Light [53]的unlab-60k训练集上训练，该数据集包含60k小时的英语语音。虽然先前的工作[14, 45]使用Libri-Light的6k小时干净子集[55]训练语言模型，但AudioLM在更多样化和嘈杂的unlab-60k子集上训练时表现出强大的性能。对训练数据质量的鲁棒性提高减少了应用我们框架所需的数据准备工作量。

full.sec: IV-B Model selection, training and inference
full.secZh: 四-B 模型选择、训练与推理

items.en: Semantic tokens. We use w2v-BERT XL [17] (0.6B parameters) and adopt a set of heuristics for choosing the intermediate layer to quantize and the number of k𝑘k-means clusters K𝐾K. Namely, we inspect ABX, sWUGGY and sBLIMP scores (see Sections III-B and IV-E) computed for different layers of the MLM module of w2v-BERT (on LibriSpeech dev-clean, scaled embeddings), as illustrated in Figure 3. In addition, we performed a small subjective evaluation test by listening to a few continuations produced by the different choices. We identified the 7th layer in the MLM module of w2v-BERT XL and K=1024𝐾1024K=1024 clusters as our best candidate.
items.zh: 语义标记。我们使用w2v-BERT XL [17]（0.6B参数），并采用一组启发式方法选择要量化的中间层和k均值聚类数K。具体来说，我们检查w2v-BERT的MLM模块不同层（在LibriSpeech dev-clean上，缩放嵌入）计算的ABX、sWUGGY和sBLIMP分数（见第III-B和IV-E节），如图3所示。此外，我们通过聆听不同选择产生的几个续接进行了小型主观评估测试。我们确定w2v-BERT XL的MLM模块第7层和K=1024聚类为最佳候选。

items.en: Acoustic tokens. We train a SoundStream codec with 12 residual vector quantizer layers with a codebook size of 1024 per layer and 4 convolutional blocks having strides (2, 4, 5, 8). This results in embeddings sampled at 50 Hz for 16 kHz inputs and a bitrate of 6000 bps (with 600 tokens per second). As shown in Table I, this model achieves very good reconstruction quality as measured by ViSQOL given the low bitrate. To split the 12 levels of quantization between coarse and fine, we set Q′=4superscript𝑄′4Q^{\prime}=4 such that we predict the flattened tokens corresponding to the coarse 4 layers in the second stage, whereas the third stage models the fine 8 layers. Hence, the third stage increases the audio bitrate from 2000 bps to 6000 bps, which, as shown in Table I, improves the audio quality significantly.
items.zh: 声学标记。我们训练了一个SoundStream编解码器，具有12个残差向量量化器层，每层码本大小为1024，以及4个卷积块，步幅为(2, 4, 5, 8)。这导致对于16 kHz输入，嵌入采样率为50 Hz，比特率为6000 bps（每秒600个标记）。如表I所示，该模型在低比特率下实现了非常好的重建质量（由ViSQOL测量）。为了将12级量化分为粗和细，我们设置Q'=4，使得我们在第二阶段预测对应于粗4层的扁平化标记，而第三阶段建模细8层。因此，第三阶段将音频比特率从2000 bps提高到6000 bps，如表I所示，这显著提高了音频质量。

items.en: Model. We use identical decoder-only Transformers in all stages, with 12 layers, 16 attention heads, embedding dimension of 1024, feed-forward layer dimension of 4096 and dropout of 0.1, together with T5-style relative positional embeddings [38], resulting in a model parameter size of 0.3B per stage. During training, we use random cropping to equivalent input lengths of 30, 10 and 3 seconds for the three stages. Furthermore, in the first two stages, we follow the previously proposed practice of removing consecutive repetitions of the semantic tokens [14]. We train each stage on 16 TPUv4s with batch size of 256 for 1M steps.
items.zh: 模型。我们在所有阶段使用相同的仅解码器Transformer，具有12层、16个注意力头、嵌入维度1024、前馈层维度4096和dropout 0.1，以及T5风格的相对位置嵌入[38]，每个阶段的模型参数大小为0.3B。在训练期间，我们对三个阶段分别使用随机裁剪到等效输入长度30、10和3秒。此外，在前两个阶段，我们遵循先前提出的做法，去除语义标记的连续重复[14]。我们在16个TPUv4上训练每个阶段，批量大小为256，共1M步。

items.en: Inference. We use temperature sampling in all stages, with temperatures of 0.6, 0.8 and 0.6 for the three stages, respectively. We found that these temperature values provide a good trade-off between diversity and semantic consistency of the generated speech. For speech continuation, we use prompts of 3 seconds. For generating the prompts, we truncate samples to the desired prompt length, extract the corresponding w2v-BERT and SoundStream tokens and use them as conditioning as described in Section III-D.
items.zh: 推理。我们在所有阶段使用温度采样，三个阶段的温度分别为0.6、0.8和0.6。我们发现这些温度值在生成语音的多样性和语义一致性之间提供了良好的权衡。对于语音续接，我们使用3秒的提示。为了生成提示，我们将样本截断到所需的提示长度，提取相应的w2v-BERT和SoundStream标记，并按照第III-D节的描述将其用作条件。

full.sec: IV-C Information represented by the semantic tokens
full.secZh: 四-C 语义标记表示的信息

items.en: We investigate the information represented by the different types of tokens to motivate the proposed hierarchical approach based on the separation of semantic and acoustic tokens. In particular, we design experiments for testing the hypothesis that, when modeling speech, the linguistic content is mostly captured by the semantic tokens, while speaker identity and recording conditions are captured by the acoustic tokens.
items.zh: 我们研究了不同类型标记所表示的信息，以基于语义和声学标记的分离提出层次化方法。特别是，我们设计了实验来测试以下假设：在对语音建模时，语言内容主要由语义标记捕获，而说话人身份和录音条件由声学标记捕获。

items.en: In the first experiment, we sample the acoustic tokens based on ground-truth semantic tokens extracted from the original speech samples, which corresponds to the “Acoustic generation” setup described in Section III-D. This is done by running the second and third stages, then comparing the linguistic content of the sampled speech to the original speech. Under the hypothesis that the linguistic content is mostly captured by the semantic tokens, the lexical semantics of the sampled and the original speech should coincide. To test this, we perform ASR using a Conformer Transducer-L [56] on the generated audio, and calculate the word error rate (WER) and the character error rate (CER) with respect to the original transcripts provided with the data as reference. We use samples from LibriSpeech test-clean with length between 4 and 10 seconds (thus retaining 2.2 hours out of 5.4) and repeat the acoustic generation three times for each sample. For comparison, we also evaluate WER and CER on the same set of samples using the unit-to-speech synthesis module of GSLM [14] as provided by textless-lib [46]. For GSLM resynthesis, we use a vocabulary of 200 tokens derived from HuBERT representations [57] which was found to provide the lowest resynthesis error [14].
items.zh: 在第一个实验中，我们基于从原始语音样本中提取的真实语义标记对声学标记进行采样，这对应于第III-D节中描述的“声学生成”设置。这是通过运行第二和第三阶段，然后将采样语音的语言内容与原始语音进行比较来完成的。在语言内容主要由语义标记捕获的假设下，采样语音和原始语音的词汇语义应该一致。为了测试这一点，我们使用Conformer Transducer-L [56]对生成的音频进行ASR，并计算相对于数据提供的原始转录的词错误率（WER）和字符错误率（CER）。我们使用LibriSpeech test-clean中长度在4到10秒之间的样本（因此从5.4小时中保留2.2小时），并对每个样本重复声学生成三次。为了比较，我们还使用textless-lib [46]提供的GSLM [14]的单元到语音合成模块，在同一组样本上评估WER和CER。对于GSLM重合成，我们使用从HuBERT表示[57]导出的200个标记的词汇表，该词汇表被发现提供最低的重合成错误[14]。

full.sec: IV-D Information represented by the acoustic tokens
full.secZh: 四-D 声学标记表示的信息

items.en: In the second experiment, we verify the hypothesis that speaker identity and recording conditions are captured by the acoustic tokens. Qualitatively, one can listen to the samples produced by the previous experiment and observe that repeating the sampling of acoustic tokens conditioned on the same semantic tokens results in a wide variety of speakers and recording conditions.
items.zh: 在第二个实验中，我们验证了说话人身份和录音条件由声学标记捕获的假设。定性地说，可以聆听前一个实验产生的样本，并观察到在相同语义标记条件下重复采样声学标记会导致各种说话人和录音条件。

items.en: In order to perform a quantitative assessment of this observation, we design the following experiment. We train a convolutional network for speaker classification inspired by [58], which operates on the log-mel spectrogram of the inputs (25 ms window length, 10 ms hop length, 64 mel bins), cropped to 1 second. The network is composed of six convolution blocks, using convolutions along the time and the frequency axes with 3×1313\times 1 and 1×3131\times 3 kernels, followed by ReLU and batch normalization. The number of channels used by each block increases with depth and is equal to [64, 128, 256, 256, 512, 512]. Whenever the number of channels is increased, max pooling with a stride of 2 is also applied along both time and frequency axes. To perform speaker classification on a sequence longer than 1 second, at inference time, we run the classifier on overlapping windows of 1 second with 250 ms hop length and aggregate the predictions. We train this model on the union of LibriSpeech train-clean-100 and test-clean using the original uncompressed samples, resulting in 291 speakers in total. Then, we randomly split the dataset, with 90% used for training and 10% for evaluation. The classifier achieves almost perfect accuracy on the evaluation split of the dataset, and Table III shows that it is also robust to lossy compression introduced by SoundStream.
items.zh: 为了对这一观察进行定量评估，我们设计了以下实验。我们训练了一个用于说话人分类的卷积网络，灵感来自[58]，该网络对输入的log-mel频谱图（25 ms窗口长度，10 ms跳跃长度，64个mel频带）进行操作，裁剪到1秒。该网络由六个卷积块组成，沿时间和频率轴使用3×1和1×3卷积核，随后是ReLU和批归一化。每个块使用的通道数随深度增加，等于[64, 128, 256, 256, 512, 512]。每当通道数增加时，还沿时间和频率轴应用步幅为2的最大池化。为了对长于1秒的序列进行说话人分类，在推理时，我们在重叠的1秒窗口上运行分类器，跳跃长度为250 ms，并聚合预测。我们在LibriSpeech train-clean-100和test-clean的并集上使用原始未压缩样本训练该模型，总共得到291个说话人。然后，我们随机分割数据集，90%用于训练，10%用于评估。分类器在数据集的评估分割上达到几乎完美的准确率，表III显示它对SoundStream引入的有损压缩也具有鲁棒性。

items.en: To verify that acoustic generation synthesizes different speakers given the same semantic tokens, we run the speaker classifier on the samples generated by AudioLM in that setting. Table III shows that, while higher than chance (3.2% compared to 100 / 291 = 0.3%), the speaker classification accuracy remains low in this case. We can conclude that the semantic tokens carry little information about the speaker identity, which is instead mostly determined by the acoustic tokens. Furthermore, based on a subjective assessment done by comparing the synthesized samples generated from the same semantic tokens, we observe that rhythm and intonation have only slight variations across different samples, suggesting that prosodic features are captured mostly by the semantic tokens, with some contribution from the acoustic tokens. In addition, we notice a large diversity in the sampled recording conditions, an indication that this characteristic is mainly represented by the acoustic tokens.
items.zh: 为了验证在给定相同语义标记的情况下，声学生成合成不同的说话人，我们在该设置下对AudioLM生成的样本运行说话人分类器。表III显示，虽然高于随机水平（3.2%对比100/291=0.3%），但说话人分类准确率在这种情况下仍然很低。我们可以得出结论，语义标记携带的说话人身份信息很少，而说话人身份主要由声学标记决定。此外，基于对从相同语义标记生成的合成样本进行的主观评估，我们观察到不同样本之间的节奏和语调只有轻微变化，表明韵律特征主要由语义标记捕获，声学标记也有一定贡献。此外，我们注意到采样录音条件具有很大的多样性，表明这一特征主要由声学标记表示。

full.sec: IV-E Probing the linguistic knowledge of AudioLM
full.secZh: 四-E 探究AudioLM的语言知识

items.en: The previous section shows the linguistic content is captured mostly by modeling of the semantic tokens in the first stage. We now conduct a series of probing experiments to assess the degree of lexical and syntactic knowledge acquired by language modeling of the semantic tokens. We use two zero-shot metrics, sWUGGY and sBLIMP, introduced in the ZeroResource Challenge 2021 [13]. The sWUGGY metric measures whether in a pair of a similar-sounding word and a non-word (e.g., “brick” and “blick”), the model gives a higher probability to the word. In turn, sBLIMP measures how often, according to the model, a grammatically correct sentence has a higher probability than a similar incorrect one (e.g., “the dogs sleep” vs. “the dog sleep”).
items.zh: 前一节表明语言内容主要由第一阶段语义标记的建模捕获。我们现在进行一系列探测实验，以评估语义标记语言建模获得的词汇和句法知识程度。我们使用两个零样本度量，sWUGGY和sBLIMP，在ZeroResource Challenge 2021 [13]中引入。sWUGGY度量衡量在一对相似发音的词和非词（例如，“brick”和“blick”）中，模型是否给词更高的概率。反过来，sBLIMP衡量根据模型，语法正确的句子比类似的不正确句子具有更高概率的频率（例如，“the dogs sleep”对比“the dog sleep”）。

items.en: We use the development datasets provided by the organizers of the ZeroResource Challenge 2021, containing 10,000 and 6,300 pairs for the sWUGGY and sBLIMP metrics, respectively, each synthesized using four voices. Following the leaderboard of the challenge, we separately consider the case where the sWUGGY pairs are pre-filtered to contain words that occur in the LibriSpeech data (referred to as the “in-vocab” subset). For both metrics, we identify the positive sample in a pair as the sequence with the higher log-likelihood according to the model. However, positive examples in the sBLIMP data are on average shorter than their negative counterparts, which can implicitly bias scores towards higher success rates. Thus, we normalize the log-likelihood returned by the model by the sequence length in all experiments.
items.zh: 我们使用ZeroResource Challenge 2021组织者提供的开发数据集，分别包含10,000和6,300对用于sWUGGY和sBLIMP度量，每对使用四个声音合成。遵循挑战排行榜，我们分别考虑sWUGGY对经过预过滤以包含LibriSpeech数据中出现的词的情况（称为“in-vocab”子集）。对于两个度量，我们将一对中的正样本识别为根据模型具有更高对数似然的序列。然而，sBLIMP数据中的正样本平均比其负样本短，这可能会隐含地偏向于更高的成功率。因此，我们在所有实验中将模型返回的对数似然除以序列长度进行归一化。

items.en: We compare the performance of AudioLM to the results reported in the ZeroResource Challenge 2021 leaderboard222https://zerospeech.com/2021/results.html and in the literature. First, we include two text-based toplines which correspond to a BERT model trained on ground-truth phonetic transcriptions, with and without forced alignment, along with a baseline BERT model trained on CPC-derived tokens [28]. Next, we include the leaderboard entry “Tu Anh et al.” that corresponds to HuBERT-only model, without an additional language modeling component, which attained the highest sWUGGY and sBLIMP scores in the leaderboard (reported in Nguyen et al. [59]). Apart from the baseline, the second-best entry in terms of sWUGGY and sBLIMP is that of Harwath et al. [60] which is based on a RoBERTA [61] model trained on top of speech representations obtained with visual grounding. We also add an improved CPC-BERT model by Nguyen et al. [59].
items.zh: 我们将AudioLM的性能与ZeroResource Challenge 2021排行榜和文献中报告的结果进行比较。首先，我们包括两个基于文本的顶线，对应于在真实音标转录上训练的BERT模型，有和没有强制对齐，以及一个在CPC派生标记[28]上训练的基线BERT模型。接下来，我们包括排行榜条目“Tu Anh et al.”，对应于仅HuBERT模型，没有额外的语言建模组件，该条目在排行榜中获得了最高的sWUGGY和sBLIMP分数（在Nguyen等人[59]中报告）。除了基线之外，在sWUGGY和sBLIMP方面第二好的条目是Harwath等人[60]的，它基于在通过视觉基础获得的语音表示上训练的RoBERTA [61]模型。我们还添加了Nguyen等人[59]的改进CPC-BERT模型。

items.en: Unlike AudioLM, the aforementioned models are not causal, so they are not well suited for speech generation. Hence, we also consider causal baselines. Firstly, we include a variant of GSLM that achieves the best sWUGGY and sBLIMP scores reported in Lakhotia et al. [14]. This model is a decoder-only Transformer language model trained using quantized HuBERT representations [33]. Next, we include the entry of van Niekerk et al. [62], obtaining the highest scores in the challenge among causal models with an LSTM model trained on CPC-based speech tokens.
items.zh: 与AudioLM不同，上述模型不是因果的，因此它们不太适合语音生成。因此，我们也考虑因果基线。首先，我们包括GSLM的一个变体，它在Lakhotia等人[14]中报告了最佳的sWUGGY和sBLIMP分数。该模型是一个仅解码器Transformer语言模型，使用量化的HuBERT表示[33]训练。接下来，我们包括van Niekerk等人[62]的条目，在因果模型中获得了挑战中的最高分数，该模型是在基于CPC的语音标记上训练的LSTM模型。

items.en: We report the results in Table IV. Compared to other systems without text supervision, AudioLM achieves the highest sWUGGY scores across both splits. Similarly, it also attains the highest score in the sBLIMP metric, improving by 8% relative over the previous state-of-the-art (CPC-BERT [59]). AudioLM even outperforms a supervised topline using forced aligned phonetic transcriptions.333Without the log-likelihood normalization discussed above, AudioLM achieves a sBLIMP score of 67.5, outperforming the phone topline. Overall, our method demonstrates a high ability to model linguistic content without any textual supervision. In particular, it significantly improves over previous work in terms of lexical and syntactic judgement quality.
items.zh: 我们在表IV中报告结果。与其他没有文本监督的系统相比，AudioLM在两个分割上都获得了最高的sWUGGY分数。同样，它在sBLIMP度量上也获得了最高分数，相对于先前的最先进技术（CPC-BERT [59]）相对提高了8%。AudioLM甚至优于使用强制对齐音标转录的监督顶线。333如果没有上述对数似然归一化，AudioLM的sBLIMP分数为67.5，超过了音素顶线。总体而言，我们的方法展示了在没有文本监督的情况下建模语言内容的高能力。特别是，它在词汇和句法判断质量方面显著优于先前的工作。

full.secZh: 四-F 生成连贯的续接

items.en: The experiments in Section IV-E show the capacity of AudioLM to model semantically and syntactically correct linguistic content. For generating convincing continuations, however, we also need coherent acoustic generation. One hallmark of our framework is its ability to continue short prompts of only 3 seconds coherently.
items.zh: 第IV-E节的实验展示了AudioLM建模语义和句法正确的语言内容的能力。然而，为了生成令人信服的延续，我们还需要连贯的声学生成。我们框架的一个标志是能够连贯地延续仅3秒的短提示。

items.en: To validate the acoustic consistency at the level of speaker identity, we reuse our speaker classifier from Section IV-D and check whether the same speaker is detected in the prompt as in the generated continuation. Concretely, we generate three continuations of 7 seconds for each 3-second prompt, where the prompts are obtained by cropping samples from Librispeech test-clean, whose length is between 4 and 10 seconds. Then, we run the speaker classifier on the sampled continuations (excluding the prompts). The last column of Table III shows that the speaker classification accuracy is higher than 92%, demonstrating that AudioLM generates continuations that strongly preserve the speaker identity. Thus, while semantic tokens carry very little speaker information, prompting AudioLM with both semantic and acoustic tokens allows preserving the speaker identity.
items.zh: 为了验证说话人身份层面的声学一致性，我们重复使用第IV-D节的说话人分类器，检查在提示和生成的延续中是否检测到相同的说话人。具体来说，我们为每个3秒提示生成三个7秒的延续，其中提示是通过裁剪Librispeech test-clean中的样本获得的，这些样本的长度在4到10秒之间。然后，我们在采样的延续（不包括提示）上运行说话人分类器。表III的最后一列显示，说话人分类准确率高于92%，表明AudioLM生成的延续强烈保留了说话人身份。因此，虽然语义标记携带的说话人信息很少，但使用语义和声学标记同时提示AudioLM可以保留说话人身份。

items.en: We further validate the result from the previous section by means of a subjective evaluation based on the following task. Raters are asked to listen to a sample of exactly 10 seconds and decide whether it is an original recording of human speech or a synthetic continuation generated by our framework. We use 100 samples in total selected from LibriSpeech test-clean, chosen at random from those with a length of at least 10 seconds, so that we can truncate the length to be exactly 10 seconds without introducing any padding. Half of these samples are ground-truth 10-second utterances, that we compress with SoundStream to match the bitrate of AudioLM outputs, such that compression artifacts cannot be used as cues to detect synthetic audio. From the remaining half, we extract prompts of 3 seconds from the beginning of the samples and generate the corresponding continuations of exactly 7 seconds (resulting in samples of 10 seconds after concatenating with the prompts). We rely on 10 raters screened for proficiency in English and instruct them that the first 3 seconds in each sample is original human speech, and thus their decision should be based on the segment following the first 3 seconds.
items.zh: 我们通过基于以下任务的主观评估进一步验证了上一节的结果。评估者被要求听一个恰好10秒的样本，并判断它是人类语音的原始录音还是我们框架生成的合成延续。我们总共使用了100个样本，这些样本从LibriSpeech test-clean中随机选择，长度至少为10秒，这样我们可以将长度截断为恰好10秒而无需引入任何填充。其中一半样本是真实的10秒话语，我们用SoundStream压缩以匹配AudioLM输出的比特率，这样压缩伪影就不能用作检测合成音频的线索。从剩下的一半中，我们从样本开头提取3秒的提示，并生成恰好7秒的相应延续（与提示拼接后得到10秒的样本）。我们依赖10名经过英语能力筛选的评估者，并告知他们每个样本的前3秒是原始人类语音，因此他们的决定应基于前3秒之后的片段。

items.en: This subjective evaluation task tests at the same time multiple desirable properties: i) the semantic and syntactic correctness of the generated linguistic content; ii) the acoustic coherence of the continuation in context of the prompt (speaker identity, prosody, recording conditions) and iii) the absence of generation artifacts. Based on the 1000 ratings collected, we find that the rate of success for assigning the correct label (original vs. synthesized) is 51.2%, which, according to a binomial test, is not statistically significantly different (p=0.23𝑝0.23p=0.23) from assigning labels uniformly at random (50% success rate). Since human raters struggle to differentiate short speech samples synthesized by AudioLM from real speech samples in an unpaired setup, the responsible model development practices call for addressing this aspect systematically, which we pursue in the following section.
items.zh: 这个主观评估任务同时测试了多个期望特性：i) 生成语言内容的语义和句法正确性；ii) 延续在提示上下文中的声学连贯性（说话人身份、韵律、录音条件）；以及iii) 没有生成伪影。基于收集的1000个评分，我们发现正确分配标签（原始与合成）的成功率为51.2%，根据二项检验，这与随机均匀分配标签（50%成功率）没有统计学显著差异（p=0.23）。由于人类评估者在非配对设置中难以区分AudioLM合成的短语音样本与真实语音样本，负责任的模型开发实践要求系统地解决这一问题，我们将在下一节中探讨。

items.en: We acknowledge that speech generation capabilities of AudioLM carry potential risks, which we further elaborate in Section VI. As a way of mitigating such risks, we accompany our framework with a method for detecting whether a speech sequence was synthesized by AudioLM. To this end, we train a convolutional network with the same architecture as the one described in Section IV-D, but for the binary classification task of differentiating between original samples and continuations generated by AudioLM (excluding the prompt). More precisely, we compare continuations to original samples compressed through SoundStream rather than uncompressed audio, since otherwise i) the task is trivial (the model quickly converges to 100% accuracy) and ii) eventual compression artifacts would become a confounding factor that would prevent evaluating the generative abilities of AudioLM. For training, we extract the original samples and prompts from LibriSpeech train-clean-100. We train on crops of 1 seconds, and compute predictions on longer sequences with the same approach as described in Section IV-D. On a balanced evaluation set, this model achieves 98.6% accuracy. This shows that despite being (almost) indistinguishable to human ears as shown by the subjective evaluation presented in Section IV-G, continuations generated by AudioLM are very easy to detect with a simple audio classifier.
items.zh: 我们承认AudioLM的语音生成能力存在潜在风险，这将在第VI节中进一步阐述。作为减轻此类风险的一种方式，我们为框架配备了一种检测语音序列是否由AudioLM合成的方法。为此，我们训练了一个卷积网络，其架构与第IV-D节描述的相同，但用于区分原始样本和AudioLM生成的延续（不包括提示）的二分类任务。更准确地说，我们将延续与通过SoundStream压缩的原始样本进行比较，而不是未压缩的音频，否则i) 任务变得简单（模型迅速收敛到100%准确率），ii) 最终的压缩伪影会成为混淆因素，妨碍评估AudioLM的生成能力。对于训练，我们从LibriSpeech train-clean-100中提取原始样本和提示。我们在1秒的裁剪片段上训练，并使用第IV-D节描述的相同方法对更长的序列计算预测。在平衡的评估集上，该模型达到了98.6%的准确率。这表明，尽管如第IV-G节的主观评估所示，AudioLM生成的延续对人类耳朵几乎无法区分，但使用简单的音频分类器很容易检测到。

items.en: We demonstrate how our approach extends beyond speech by generating coherent piano music continuations. For this, we retrain all components of AudioLM on an internal dataset of 40k hours of piano music that includes players from beginner to expert level, and exhibits a wide range of different acoustic conditions, with content ranging from piano scale exercises to famous pieces. The model hyperparameters are identical to the speech continuation setup, except for the acoustic generation stage: we found that a codec with 3 layers of quantization and a larger codebook size of 214superscript2142^{14} per layer already provides high reconstruction quality, so the experiments on piano continuation ignore the third stage and directly predict the 3 levels of acoustic tokens in the second stage. At inference, we extract a 4-second prompt from the Maestro dataset [63]. The accompanying material1 shows side-by-side comparisons of generations based on acoustic tokens only, or using the full AudioLM framework. While both are of equally high audio quality, analogously to the speech continuation experiments, only the latter display consistent melody and temporal structure. To substantiate this observation, we conduct a subjective evaluation test with 10 raters, in which the raters are asked to express their preference between 15 pairs of continuations (20 seconds each) generated using a model trained on only acoustic tokens and AudioLM, using the same prompt for each pair. The raters preferred the samples produced by AudioLM in 83.3% of the pairs. This shows that the hierarchical modeling of AudioLM, from semantic to acoustic tokens, not only benefits speech generation by separating linguistic content from speaker identity, but more generally improves audio generation by explicitly disentangling the long-term structure and local acoustic details.
items.zh: 我们展示了我们的方法如何通过生成连贯的钢琴音乐延续而超越语音。为此，我们在一个包含4万小时钢琴音乐的内部数据集上重新训练了AudioLM的所有组件，该数据集包括从初学者到专家水平的演奏者，并展示了广泛的不同声学条件，内容从钢琴音阶练习到著名曲目。模型超参数与语音延续设置相同，但声学生成阶段除外：我们发现，一个具有3层量化和每层更大码本大小（2^14）的编解码器已经提供了高重建质量，因此钢琴延续实验忽略了第三阶段，直接在第二阶段预测3个级别的声学标记。在推理时，我们从Maestro数据集[63]中提取一个4秒的提示。随附材料1展示了仅基于声学标记或使用完整AudioLM框架生成的并排比较。虽然两者都具有同样高的音频质量，但与语音延续实验类似，只有后者显示出连贯的旋律和时间结构。为了证实这一观察，我们进行了一项有10名评估者的主观评估测试，其中评估者被要求表达他们对15对延续（每对20秒）的偏好，这些延续是使用仅基于声学标记的模型和AudioLM生成的，每对使用相同的提示。评估者在83.3%的配对中更喜欢AudioLM生成的样本。这表明，AudioLM从语义到声学标记的分层建模不仅通过分离语言内容和说话人身份有利于语音生成，而且通过明确解耦长期结构和局部声学细节，总体上改善了音频生成。

items.en: We introduce AudioLM, a framework for audio generation that provides both long-term coherence and high audio quality. Relying on a hybrid tokenization scheme of semantic and acoustic tokens, AudioLM performs autoregressive prediction by cascading three stages of language modeling that hierarchically generate audio from the coarsest semantic level up to the finest acoustic details. Experiments on speech generation show that not only AudioLM can generate syntactically and semantically coherent speech without any text, but also that continuations produced by our model are almost indistinguishable from real speech by humans. We alleviate the risks associated to these realistic continuations by training a classifier which recognizes speech generated by our method with very high accuracy. Furthermore, we show that AudioLM can generate high-quality piano continuations, demonstrating the benefits of our framework for audio generation beyond speech. This encourages the future extensions to other types of audio (e.g., multilingual speech, polyphonic music, and audio events) as well as integrating AudioLM into an encoder-decoder framework for conditioned tasks such as text-to-speech or speech-to-speech translation.
items.zh: 我们介绍了AudioLM，一个提供长期连贯性和高音频质量的音频生成框架。依靠语义和声学标记的混合标记化方案，AudioLM通过级联三个语言建模阶段进行自回归预测，从最粗略的语义级别到最精细的声学细节分层生成音频。语音生成实验表明，AudioLM不仅可以在没有任何文本的情况下生成句法和语义连贯的语音，而且我们模型生成的延续与真实语音几乎无法区分。我们通过训练一个分类器来减轻与这些逼真延续相关的风险，该分类器能够以非常高的准确率识别由我们的方法生成的语音。此外，我们展示了AudioLM可以生成高质量的钢琴延续，证明了我们的框架在语音之外的音频生成方面的优势。这鼓励了未来扩展到其他类型的音频（例如，多语言语音、复调音乐和音频事件），以及将AudioLM集成到编码器-解码器框架中，用于文本到语音或语音到语音翻译等条件任务。

items.en: The ability of AudioLM to synthesize high-quality audio with long-term coherent structure unlocks use-cases ranging from helping people with speech impediments to assisting in composing music. However, there are several risks associated with our model. When modeling speech, AudioLM inherits all concerns about language models for text, such as reflecting the societal biases in the underlying data — we refer to Chowdhery et al. [10] for a detailed discussion on the ethical considerations for text-based language models. Furthermore, the generated speech continuations might not be consistent with the prompt in terms of accent and dialect for underrepresented groups in the training data. The ability to continue short speech segments while maintaining speaker identity and prosody can potentially lead to malicious use-cases such as spoofing biometric identification [64] or impersonating a specific speaker [65]. Therefore, following the responsible AI practices, it is of paramount importance to design mechanisms that safeguard against the misuse of AudioLM. As an important step towards this direction, in Section IV-H we provide a model for accurately detecting audio synthesized by AudioLM.
items.zh: AudioLM合成具有长期连贯结构的高质量音频的能力解锁了从帮助有语言障碍的人到辅助作曲等多种用例。然而，我们的模型存在若干风险。在对语音建模时，AudioLM继承了文本语言模型的所有担忧，例如反映底层数据中的社会偏见——我们参考Chowdhery等人[10]关于基于文本的语言模型的伦理考虑的详细讨论。此外，生成的语音延续可能在口音和方言方面与提示不一致，特别是对于训练数据中代表性不足的群体。在保持说话人身份和韵律的同时延续短语音片段的能力可能导致恶意用例，例如欺骗生物识别[64]或冒充特定说话人[65]。因此，遵循负责任的AI实践，设计防止AudioLM滥用的机制至关重要。作为朝着这个方向迈出的重要一步，在第IV-H节中，我们提供了一个准确检测AudioLM合成音频的模型。
